quality.rationale: 基础运动学定义应用，直接套洛伦兹因子公式，解答完整

origin.question: Problem 1.1. The 4-velocity $\mathbf{u}$ corresponds to 3-velocity $\mathbf{v}$ . Express:\n(a) $\mathbf{u}^0$ in terms of $|\underline{\mathbf{v}}|$
origin.solution:
Solution 1.1. $\mathbf{u} = (\gamma, \gamma \mathbf{v})$ , where $\gamma \equiv (1 - \mathbf{v}^2)^{- rac{1}{2}} = \mathbf{u}^0 = \mathrm{d}t / \mathrm{d}	au$ . Thus:
(a) $\mathbf{u}^0 = (1 - \mathbf{v}^2)^{- rac{1}{2}}$   
(b) $\mathbf{u}^{\mathrm{j}} = (1 - \underbrace{\mathbf{v}^{2}})^{- rac{1}{2}}\mathbf{v}^{\mathrm{j}}$   
(c) $\mathbf{u} \cdot \mathbf{u} = -1$ since it is a 4-velocity, so
$$
\mathbf {u}^{0} = \left[ 1 + \left(\mathbf {u}^{1}ight)^{2} + \left(\mathbf {u}^{2}ight)^{2} + \left(\mathbf {u}^{3}ight)^{2}ight]^{ rac {1}{2}} \equiv \left(1 + \mathbf {u}^{\mathrm {j}} \mathbf {u}_{\mathrm {j}}ight)^{ rac {1}{2}}
$$
(d) $\mathrm{d} / \mathrm{d}	au = (\mathrm{d}t / \mathrm{d}	au)\mathrm{d} / \mathrm{d}t = (1 - \underline{\mathrm{v}}^2)^{- rac{1}{2}}\mathrm{d} / \mathrm{d}t$ 
(e) $v^{j} = u^{j} / u^{0} = u^{j}(1 + u^{i}u_{i})^{- rac{1}{2}}$ 
(f) $\left|\widetilde{\mathbf{v}}ight| = \left[1 - \left(\mathbf{u}^{0}ight)^{-2}ight]^{ rac{1}{2}},$ from (a).
